history.content:
<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B and I am facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward now leads to lava at row 02 column C, which is lethal. I must avoid moving forward. I should turn clockwise to face down, so I can move safely into row 03 column B on the next move.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B, facing down (`v`). Ahead is cell row 03 column B, which is a floor cell (`.`) and safe to move into. The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward now is safe and will bring me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at row 03, column B, facing down (`v`). The goal `O` is at row 04, column D. Moving forward from my current position will take me to row 04, column B which is a safe floor cell. I should move forward to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 04 column B and facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 04 column D. Going forward will lead me into lava at column C, so I need to avoid that. To reach the goal, I should turn right to face right (`>`). To turn from facing down to facing right, I need to rotate clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 04 column B and I am facing left `<`. The goal is at row 04 column D. To reach it, I need to turn around to face right `>`. I will turn clockwise twice to face right safely.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 04 column B facing up (`^`). The goal is at row 04 column D. To reach it, I need to move right. First, I need to turn clockwise to face right (`>`).
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 04 column B and facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04 column D. However, the cell at row 04 column C contains lava (`L`), so moving forward is dangerous. I need to find an alternative route. I see from the map that moving up from my current position to row 03 column B and then moving right along row 03 could be safe since there is no lava there. To move up, I must turn left (counter-clockwise) from facing right to facing up (`^`).
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 04 column B facing up (`^`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D and there is lava at column C in the same row. Moving forward would lead me to lava at row 03 column B or row 02 column B after moving forward and turning, so I need to find a safer way. To avoid lava at C4 and reach D4, I should rotate to face right (`>`), then move forward twice to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at row 04, column B, facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04, column D. The cell at column C has lava (`L`), so moving forward would be deadly. I need to find a way around the lava by changing direction. If I turn clockwise, I'll face down towards a wall (`#`), which is not valid. If I turn counter-clockwise, I will face up towards row 03, column B, which is free (`.`). Moving forward from there is safe. So I should turn counter-clockwise now to face up.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 04 column B and I am facing up (`^`). The goal is at row 04 column D. The path forward (up) is blocked by an empty cell but to reach the goal I need to face right `>`. From facing up, I will rotate clockwise to face right.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 04 column B facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04 column D. The cell at C04 is lava (`L`), so I cannot move forward directly. I need to change orientation to avoid the lava. Turning clockwise will face me down (`v`), which leads to a wall at D05, so that is not a good option. Turning counter-clockwise will face me up (`^`), which leads to cell B03, a safe floor cell, so I should turn counter-clockwise to start navigating around the lava.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 04 column B facing up (`^`). The goal is at row 04 column D. In front of me (row 03 column B) is a safe floor cell. To reach the goal I need to move right eventually, but first I can move forward safely. So the next step is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 03 column B and facing up (`^`). The goal is at row 04 column D. To reach it safely, I need to move around the lava cells at C2 and C4. Moving forward (up) would take me to B2 which is a safe floor cell. So, I will move forward first.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B facing up `^`. The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward leads to a wall or off the map, so I can't go up. I need to turn to face right `>` and move forward to get closer to the goal while avoiding lava cells. To face right from up, I need to turn clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B and I am facing right (`>`). The next cell forward is lava (`L`), which is deadly. I need to avoid moving forward. To reach the goal at row 04 column D, I should turn downwards first. From right (`>`), turning clockwise will face me down (`v`).
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>
